headline: Is SoFi’s Mixed Q1 2026 Signals Altering The Investment Case For SoFi Technologies (SOFI)?
summary: Earlier this month, SoFi Technologies reported strong Q1 2026 results, including US$1.10 billion in revenue and US$166.7 million in GAAP net income, while facing questions over unchanged full-year guidance, a short-seller report, and weakness in its Technology Platform segment after losing a major client. At the same time, SoFi is pushing ahead with broader ambitions, from minting its own stablecoin with Mastercard for global settlement to integrating acquisitions and expanding lending,...

headline: Mastercard: The Other Visa
summary: Mastercard delivered robust Q1 2026 results, with net revenue and adjusted EPS up year-over-year. Learn why MA stock is a buy.
